```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/FREBE/OneDrive - Novonesis/Projects/Gel-firmness assays/Balldrop")

install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
install.packages("RColorBrewer")
library(RColorBrewer)
df <- read.csv("timecurve.csv", sep = ";")

my_red <- brewer.pal(9, "Reds")[7]
library(ggplot2)

A <- ggplot(df, aes(x = time, y = area)) +
  geom_line(color = my_red, linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ video_id, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Area over Time for Each Sample",
    x = "Time (s)",
    y = "Area"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
A

ggsave("AOT.png",plot=A,width=10,height=6,dpi=600)
```
